Class HuggingFaceProvider

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.event.BasicPropertyChangeSource
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider.AbstractAiProvider
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible.OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider
uno.anahata.asi.huggingface.HuggingFaceProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyChangeSource, Rebindable
public class HuggingFaceProvider extends OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider
A specialized provider for the Hugging Face Inference API that performs deep model inspection by fetching metadata directly from the HF Hub.

  • Field Details

    • HF_HUB_BASE

      private static final String HF_HUB_BASE
      The base URL for the Hugging Face Hub metadata API.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • HUB_CLIENT

      private static final HttpClient HUB_CLIENT
      A specialized HTTP client for fetching model configuration files from the Hub. Uses a short timeout and follows redirects to the Hub's CDN.

  • Constructor Details

    • HuggingFaceProvider

      public HuggingFaceProvider()
      Constructs a new Hugging Face provider with the stable UUID 'HuggingFace' and pre-configured endpoint and acquisition URIs.

  • Method Details

    • listModels

      public List<? extends AbstractModel> listModels()
      Fetches the list of all models available from the provider's API. This method is intended to be called by the caching mechanism.

      Implementation details: Performs a GET request to the /models endpoint of the configured getBaseUrl(). Parses the standard OpenAI list-response and wraps each ID in an OpenAiCompatibleModel instance.

      Implementation details: Orchestrates a parallel "Deep Inspection" phase using the container's shared executor to fetch model metadata from the Hugging Face Hub.

      Overrides:
      listModels in class OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider
      Returns:
      A list of provider-specific AbstractModel objects.

    • isRetryable

      public boolean isRetryable(int statusCode, String responseBody)
      Determines if an HTTP status code or response body indicates a transient failure that should trigger a retry or rotation.

      Checks for common OpenAI-compatible error codes (429, 503, 500, 499, 408).

      Implementation details: Adds specific handling for Hugging Face credit-related errors (HTTP 402).

      Overrides:
      isRetryable in class OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider
      Parameters:
      statusCode - The HTTP status code.
      responseBody - The raw response body.
      Returns:
      true if retryable, false otherwise.

    • inspectModel

      private HuggingFaceModel inspectModel(String modelId)
      Performs the deep inspection of a specific model by fetching its configuration files from the Hub.
      Parameters:
      modelId - The Hugging Face repo ID.
      Returns:
      A populated HuggingFaceModel instance.

    • fetchHubJson

      private CompletableFuture<com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode> fetchHubJson(String modelId, String filename)
      Helper to fetch a JSON file from the Hugging Face Hub's main branch.
      Parameters:
      modelId - The repo ID.
      filename - The config filename (e.g. 'config.json').
      Returns:
      A CompletableFuture resolving to the parsed JSON or null.
